center.name: 利馬大區
center.summary: 利馬大區是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联10种鸟类，包括Tumbesian tyrannulet、Baird's flycatcher、Piura chat-tyrant等10种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Baird's flycatcher is found in the lowlands from central Manabí Province in west-central Ecuador south to Peru's Lima Department

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Andes from Peru's Department of Lima south into Chile's Tarapacá Region and through western Bolivia into far northwestern Argentina's Jujuy Province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in the western Peruvian Department of Lima

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate fasciated wren is found in coastal Peru from the Department of Piura south to the Department of Lima and also inland Peru from the departments of Cajamarca and Amazonas south to the Department of Huánuco

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Piura chat-tyrant is found in northern Peru on the western slope of the Andes from southeastern Piura Department south to central Ancash Department. One record in Lima Department suggests its range may extend further south than thought.{{cite journal |last=Baumann |first=M

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies occurs in the valleys of the Chillón and Rímac rivers in the Department of Lima

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: superciliaris is the northernmost; it occurs in the western Peruvian departments of Ancash and Lima

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of the striated earthcreeper is found in the Andes of northern and central Peru from the Department of Cajamarca south to the departments of Lima and Junín

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: One population is found in the Cordillera Blanca of Peru's Department of Ancash and adjacent Department of Lima

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: inflavus is found in Peru from central Piura and Lambayeque departments south to northern Lima Department
